info.title: AudioDN API
info.summary: Audio delivery infrastructure: upload, transcode, secure delivery, and playback.
info.description:
AudioDN provides a REST API and embeddable web components for managing and delivering audio at scale.

Authentication: bearer token via the `Authorization` header. Use a server-side API key for full access; mint scoped client-side keys (Player or Uploader) for browsers and mobile apps.

All endpoints are prefixed with `/v1/`.

BearerAuth.description: Server-side API key. Use scoped client-side keys for browser and mobile contexts.

player_color_light.description: Derived read-only variant of player_color adjusted to stay legible on a light background.

player_color_dark.description: Derived read-only variant of player_color adjusted to stay legible on a dark background.

player_color_light.description: Derived read-only variant of player_color adjusted to stay legible on a light background.

player_color_dark.description: Derived read-only variant of player_color adjusted to stay legible on a dark background.

player_color_light.description: Derived read-only variant of player_color adjusted to stay legible on a light background.

player_color_dark.description: Derived read-only variant of player_color adjusted to stay legible on a dark background.

type.description: Variant kind (e.g. transcode, preview, waveform, analysis).

post.description: Generate a new player, uploader, or share API key. Requires an API Access ('api') key; API Access keys themselves must be created in the dashboard.

collection_id.description: Limit the key to a specific collection

track_id.description: Limit the key to a specific track (requires collection_id)

creator_id.description: Limit the key to a specific creator

variants.description: Allowed variants. Required (exactly one) for share keys; optional for player keys

expires_at.description: Optional expiration for all types; ignored for share keys

200.description: API key created. The full key is returned once and never stored in plaintext.

api_key.description: The full API key including org prefix (returned once)

403.description: Forbidden — API Access keys must be created in the dashboard, or the caller key is not an API Access key

organization_index.description: Your external identifier for the creator (the remote service identifier).

post.summary: Generate a collection cover image upload URL
Generate a track cover image upload URL

post.description: Appends a new track file to an already-processed track and queues processing. Only 'transcode' and 'preview' are supported. Common body fields: variant_type_id, index. Transcode fields: codec, bitrate, is_stereo, is_strip_tags, is_strip_cover (lossy codecs only; codec defaults to aac at 128 kbps). Preview fields: preview_type, preview_seconds / preview_min_percent / preview_max_percent (when preview_type is seconds), preview_percent / preview_min_seconds / preview_max_seconds (when preview_type is percent), preview_start_percent — plus the same Transcode audio fields. The track is moved to 'processing' and returns to 'ready' when the file is generated.

index.description: Delivery name; unique across organization and track variants

preview_start_percent.description: preview only: clip start as a percent of duration

409.description: A variant with the given index already exists for this track.

422.description: The track has no source file to process yet.

collection_id.description: Required unless the API key is scoped to a collection.

expires_in.description: Session duration in seconds (default 3600, min 60, max 86400).

get.description: No authentication required — the session ID acts as the credential.

post.summary: Create a track within an upload session
post.description: Call once per file to obtain a per-track upload URL. No authentication required — the session ID acts as the credential.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: "collection" or "track". "playlist" is reserved for a future release and currently returns 400.

is_downloadable.description: Requests downloadable tracks. Only honored when the API key also allows downloads; the stored value is api_key.is_downloadable AND this request.

expires_in.description: Session duration in seconds (default 3600, min 60, max 86400).

first_track.description: Full playback data for the first track, including signed variant URLs, so a player can render without a second call.

get.summary: Get a track within a play session
get.description: No authentication required — the session ID acts as the credential.

200.description: Track within the play session, including signed variant URLs.

get.summary: Download a variant of a track within a play session
get.description: Returns a short-lived signed download URL for a specific variant. Only available when the session's stored is_downloadable is true; otherwise returns 403. No authentication required — the session ID acts as the credential.
